Figure 2: Performance comparison of basic MAD and AGENT-RADAR on MuSiQue. Left: Impact of varying the number of agents. Right: Impact of varying the number of rounds.

Figure 1: Overview of AGENT-RADAR. (Top) MAS interactions rapidly accumulate long communication histories, where useful information is buried in the middle, receiving insufficient attention. (Bottom) AGENT-RADAR preserves the full transcript and topology, scores sentence-level context by semantic relevance weighted with temporal and spatial decay, and steers the agent’s attention toward the selected context during inference.
